title: write_smt2: bugs caused by a corner case in constant propagation

features.name: signed wire with narrow bit width assigned from wider constant
features.description: Code should include a signed wire with narrower bit width assigned a wider constant value for testing sign extension behavior

features.name: sequential update using signed wire with incorrect sign extension
features.description: Code should include a sequential element (register) updated from a signed wire with narrow bit width to expose sign extension bugs in formal verification output

features.name: write_smt2 formal verification output generation
features.description: Code should include a Yosys script that runs write_smt2 command to expose incorrect constant propagation in SMT-LIB output for signed values
features.snippet: read_verilog -formal top.v; proc; opt; memory -nordff -nomap; opt -fast; dffunmap; write_smt2 -wires
